# aisw

> Documentation for aisw CLI.

Current version: 0.3.2

## Docs

- [aisw documentation](https://burakdede.github.io/aisw/): Install and use aisw for account/profile management across Claude Code, Codex CLI, and Gemini CLI.
- [Quickstart](https://burakdede.github.io/aisw/quickstart/): Install aisw, initialize, add profiles, and switch accounts.
- [Commands](https://burakdede.github.io/aisw/commands/): Command and flag reference for aisw.
- [Automation and Scripting](https://burakdede.github.io/aisw/automation/): Non-interactive usage, JSON output, and scripting-safe patterns.
- [Shell Integration](https://burakdede.github.io/aisw/shell-integration/): Shell hook and completion setup for bash, zsh, and fish.
- [Adding Profiles](https://burakdede.github.io/aisw/adding-profiles/): Add profiles with API keys or interactive OAuth flows.
- [Supported Tools](https://burakdede.github.io/aisw/supported-tools/): Tool support matrix and auth/backend behavior.
- [Configuration](https://burakdede.github.io/aisw/configuration/): Config file structure and active-profile state.
- [Why aisw?](https://burakdede.github.io/aisw/why-aisw/): Problem statement and scope of aisw.
- [Troubleshooting](https://burakdede.github.io/aisw/troubleshooting/): Common errors and direct fixes.

## Project

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/burakdede/aisw): Source code, releases, and issue tracking.
- [README](https://github.com/burakdede/aisw/blob/main/README.md): Project overview and install guidance.
